race.comment: STEEL TSUNAMI (6) showed good early toe here second up before being run down late by fitter horses. Strops fitter again and gets an important 3kg claim. Expecting her to be prominent again and have plenty to offer when they sprint. NOSTRYIA (4) missed by a head when resuming and has since caught the eye with two good late efforts. Will likely get a long way back from the draw but if the tempo is genuine he can cause a late scare. CHARLESFORT (7) made light work of his rivals fresh when pulling away for a big win in the slop. Winning hoop stays on and claims 2kg. Up to this. ROCKTAGON (5) dug deep to go on better last time after being run down late at Bordertown two back. Drawn sticky but has found winning form and is 1/1 at this track and trip. Have to consider.
